pi_items.source: setup_task.sh variable tracing: ASSETS_DIR='$USER_HOME/Desktop/assets' where USER_HOME='/home/ga'
setup_task.sh creates exactly 2 PNG images (chart_sales.png, graph_growth.png); verifier.py line 86 enforces 'if image_count < 2' check

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic LibreOffice Impress presentation located at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/quarterly_review.odp, which contains 2 linked images stored at /home/ga/Desktop/assets. The images are dummy PNG files (chart_sales.png and graph_growth.png) created with ImageMagick during setup. The presentation is generated using the odfpy library with external file:// URLs for the images. The task requires breaking these external links to embed the images into the presentation file.
